what_it_does: This file is a YAML-frontmatter attachment record that registers an image attachment (id att-f1c10cde) in the design-source channel, pointing to the image target image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-10 and recording when it was added.
observations: YAML frontmatter only; no body content
Target uses an image:// URI pointing to recent-pitches/p-10
Added timestamp is ISO 8601 with explicit UTC offset (2026-06-22T11:31:02.007525+00:00)
standouts: Image attachment reference to recent-pitches/p-10 in the design-source channel
conventions: URI-style target reference using image:// scheme
concerns: No caption, title, or description of the attached image
No recorded author or source of the attachment
Target URI cannot be verified from this file alone
No version or checksum for the referenced image
notes: A bare metadata stub that links an image asset to a design-source channel pitch entry.
questions: What visual content does image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-10 contain?
Who added this attachment and why?
Is p-10 a pitch identifier, and how does this image relate to it?
Does the referenced image asset actually exist and is it accessible?
purpose_vs_actual: The file acts as an attachment ledger entry, which matches its stated purpose; it records an association but provides no descriptive content beyond the link.
intention_signals: It appears intended to catalog an image attachment for a recent design pitch so the asset can be tracked, retrieved, and associated with the design-source channel.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed association between a channel and an image asset, supporting attachment retrieval and audit trails in a fused ledger system.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML metadata attachment record (att-f1c10cde) in the design-source channel that points to image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-10 and records a 2026 UTC addition timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to register an image attachment for a recent pitch in the design-source channel.
